category_sources: source_facts.description says compiler for writing C extensions for Python; official Cython README describes an optimizing Python compiler.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official website use Cython.
docs_sources: Official Cython README lists https://docs.cython.org/ as documentation and https://cython.org/ as official website.
repo_sources: Official Cython GitHub README lists https://github.com/cython/cython as the GitHub repository; source_facts.repo is empty.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says Python C-extension compiler; official README describes translating Python code to C/C++ code.
